title: NLP / AI Engineer
company_focus: Global asset management and investment firm
description:
Role/Responsibilities:

We are seeking a NLP engineer for a NLP research team within
Point72. The ideal candidate has a track record of
developing modern NLP solutions, including the use of LLMs,
agents, RAG, open-source models fine-tuning and deployment,
etc.

Responsibilities include:

- Exploring and combining rich internal and external textual
  datasets
- Building GenAI solutions, leveraging both internal models
  and external APIs
- Formulating research hypothesis to derive alpha
- Post-training models for specific tasks
- Benchmarking LLM approaches internal tasks

We believe the investment world offers unique opportunities
to use modern NLP methods. We are a team ideally situated
for that, having access to both internal and commercial
datasets, with an end-to-end research philosophy and direct
portfolio impact.

Requirements:

- Bachelor, Master’s or PhD graduate or candidate in computer
  science or another quantitative discipline
- Experience in NLP, particularly LLMs.
- Proficient in Python, SQL and general software engineering
  principles (github, testing, etc.)
- Data science stack familiarity
- Interest in financial markets
- Collaborative mindset

About Point72:

Point72 Asset Management is a global firm led by Steven
Cohen that invests in multiple asset classes and strategies
worldwide. Resting on more than a quarter-century of
investing experience, we seek to be the industry’s premier
asset manager through delivering superior risk-adjusted
returns, adhering to the highest ethical standards, and
offering the greatest opportunities to the industry’s
brightest talent.  We’re inventing the future of finance by
revolutionizing how we develop our people and how we use
data to shape our thinking. For more information, visit
www.Point72.com/working-here.
responsibilities: Exploring and combining rich internal and external textual datasets

Formulating research hypothesis to derive alpha
Benchmarking LLM approaches on internal tasks
use_cases: Analysis of financial textual data and datasets
Natural language processing for investment research
GenAI-powered solutions for financial decision making
ai_classification_reasoning:
Role involves building GenAI solutions, post-training
models, fine-tuning and deploying LLMs, implementing RAG and
agents. This is direct hands-on work with AI/ML models
rather than supporting infrastructure.
